name: Atholton High School
description: Atholton High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Columbia, MD. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Atholton Park
description:
Water fountains and restrooms are available on site.

In addition to the two dedicated pickleball courts, there are 2 tennis courts lined for 4 pickleball courts. Bring a net to use these.

name: Blandair Park
description: Just went to these courts today (5/2/23) and there are no lines on these tennis courts! Great facility otherwise. Too bad we can’t enjoy pickleball on the courts.
